calibration_note: Role mappings and fit weights are editorial starting points over the currently registered CANDIDATE patterns. No binding here is measured Instagram performance; recalibrate only from real per-account results.

role_bindings.applicability_basis: Quote/reversal headline with a person photo was observed on news/issue-style covers; hypothesis_only (n=1), reference tier only.
Quote/reversal headline hook observed on issue/entertainment-style explore content; hypothesis_only (n=1), reference tier only.
Numbered curation list structure (repeated same-format items) was observed across humor/issue and lifestyle accounts; benchmark_observed (n=3), reference tier only.

Comment-keyword DM CTA is the only observed CTA pattern, but it carries manipulation_risk/funnel_risk flags and its own record forbids default use; the binder's role risk gate is expected to block it, leaving cta_strategy explicitly unavailable rather than silently bound.

slide_count_hint_bindings.basis: Evidence shows repeated same-format list items with a variable item count; no measured slide-count distribution exists, so only variable-length support is asserted and no slide number is produced.

notes: Account ids and category vocabulary mirror config/source_intake_account_routing.json and config/source_intake_account_top_selection.json.
Only pattern ids that already exist in knowledge/patterns/pattern_registry.jsonl may appear in role_bindings; the binder verifies existence and never invents patterns.

All currently registered Instagram-learning patterns are CANDIDATE, so every possible binding today is reference_only and production_planning_eligible stays false until real promotion per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md.

account_c_beauty_fashion has no role bindings because no observed beauty/fashion pattern exists in the registry yet; its topics deterministically report pattern_unavailable instead of borrowing another account's patterns.

pattern.instagram_learning.content_pattern.regional_institution_notice_style and healthcare_public_character_illustration are intentionally unmapped: their observed contexts (regional/institutional notice accounts, hospital/public accounts) do not match any current account portfolio.
visual_direction is unmapped for every account because no registered pattern's observed context matches the current portfolios; it reports pattern_unavailable rather than a stretched binding.
